scripts.build:zip: rm -f dist/xyfy-txt-reader-v$npm_package_version.zip && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/xyfy-txt-reader-v$npm_package_version.zip manifest.json background modules popup reader icons/icon16.png icons/icon32.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png
scripts.test: npm run test:paginator && npm run test:backup && npm run test:storage-sync
